rationale: The cited paper is used to position the contribution of the 2017 paper, not just as a generic background reference. In the discussion, the authors explicitly state that their approach is "complements but is distinct from" adaptive self-explication methods and cite Netzer and Srinivasan (2011) as the exemplar of that stream. They use this contrast to clarify what is novel about their own design strategy (ex ante customization via self-stated auxiliary data rather than adaptive updating from prior choice responses). This is a meaningful conceptual positioning role even though the cited method is not directly reused.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Netzer and Srinivasan (2011) as a substantive comparison point to delineate its own methodological contribution. It contrasts its self-stated, a priori customized design approach with adaptive self-explication methods that adapt later tasks based on earlier responses.
